title: Summary: Turn 28
content: Pueblo is a CLI-first + Electron desktop code agent framework (TypeScript, Node.js 22 LTS) with a layered architecture: input routing → command dispatch / agent execution → LLM provider adapters (GitHub Copilot, DeepSeek) → tool calls (exec, glob, grep, read) → SQLite persistence. Its core modules include agent runtime (Pepe supervisor/worker), memory (semantic embedding + retrieval), sessions, commands, and a React-based desktop UI via Vite.
